selectProject: Select a project from the sidebar to open a terminal
restoreQueuedHint: Waiting for another terminal to finish launching...
restoreFailedHint: Check the terminal output for details
waitingToRestoreHint: Select this tab to start its saved session
unsavedChangesDesc: This file has unsaved changes. Discard and close?
unsavedTabsCount: {{count}} tab(s) have unsaved changes. Discard all and close?
poppedOutPlaceholder: Popped out to a separate window. Close the window to reclaim.
cannotDeleteLastLayout: The last layout cannot be deleted
deleteLayoutDescription: This layout will be removed. Running terminal sessions and popped-out windows in it will also be closed.
orchestratorLaunchProjectPathMissing: Ignored MCP launch event because project path is missing
voiceEnableInSettings: Enable voice input in Settings first
voiceApiKeyMissing: Configure the current voice service API key first
voiceRecorderUnsupported: Recording is not supported by this WebView
sessionBindCurrent: Bound to {{id}}… (source: {{source}}). This conversation will be restored after restart.
sessionBindNone: No session id bound. This tab will open a fresh conversation after restart; pick a past session below to bind manually.
sessionBindEmpty: No past sessions found for this project.
sessionBindManualPlaceholder: Paste a session UUID to bind manually
sessionBindBoundTooltip: Bound to session {{id}}… (source: {{source}}); restorable after restart. Click to inspect/rebind
sessionBindUnboundTooltip: No session id bound; restart opens a new conversation. Click to bind manually
